channel.title: Posts on o9uz.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on o9uz.dev

item.title: I met the computer
item.description: Today is September 11 Monday. It was the first day of school. I had very excited. We had waited in front of the computer classroom for the first lesson. Finally! The teacher opened the door. It was a dark room with a black curtain. Inside the room, there were many tables and each table there was one computer. The teacher took us in. We sit down on the tables. The lesson had started.

item.title: Electronic Circuits
item.description: I had always been a child who wondered. What is what? How it works? I had interested in electronic circuit components and electronic circuits until I meet the computer. I made many electronics circuits flipflops, amplifiers, FM-Radio, pic, etc. One time, I made FM-Radio with my grandpa. He had wonder like me and he always has liked new things. We adjusted the frequency of radio to the neighbors’ radios. He caught the microphone and started to speak.

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: For a long time, I want to write a blog and I’m here. Here we go. I preferred to start with Hugo but I had thought Jekyll previously. Nowadays I interested in Golang, therefore, I preferred Hugo. My website preparation works will continue for a while. Thank you for your patience. On my personal website, you’ll find my musings and thoughts about random topics. Also, I’ll write about the past when I remember.
